target.description: The subject of the deliverable being certified (e.g., 'RouteForge GTM strategy')

scope.description: What to certify: 'all' scans entire workspace, or a specific file pattern (e.g., 'gtm_strategy_*')

description: Evidence certification for deliverables — scans workspace artifacts, maps claims to sources, flags confidence levels, identifies gaps and contradictions. Produces a structured evidence appendix that downstream formatters embed in the final document.
usage: certify evidence, evidence appendix, source verification, confidence assessment, claim mapping, attest, evidence trail, self-assessment, document certification
